title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・我が君の凱旋

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd erupts into cheers and jubilation as Air
Groove takes the victory at the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Air Groove and Silence Suzuka say they'll
remember the race for the rest of their lives, and
they promise to have an even more exciting
match in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Air Groove thanks me for always
believing in her.
